history.msg: Captured 4 resources (source=web_search) — primary: databricks.com/glossary/rag, dev.to RAG pipeline walkthrough, promptingguide.ai/research/rag, machinelearningplus.com simple-rag-explained

Corpus generated — standard depth, ~2200 words. Sections 2-11 written. RAG definition, 5-step pipeline, prompt template, two phases (index/query), common failure points. Why RAG/hallucination → 14.3, when to use → 14.4. All 4 primary resources cited.
Corpus critic FAIL cycle 1 — length_sanity: ~1,965w vs 3,000w standard floor (34% below). Soft: §7 paragraphs lack per-case citations. Revising corpus.

Corpus critic PASSED cycle 2 — all 6 checks green. ~3,600w standard range. Added: WHY+failure-mode per step, 3-element prompt-template analysis, §6 failure-point checklist, 5th real-world use case (medical Q&A), §8.5 similarity threshold. Citation rate 85%. Two soft notes (§8.2 example, §9 exercise) — non-blocking.
HITL #2 complete — all 9 sections approved as written, depth=standard, expected_delivery=7min, diagram=true. Intent: 5-step RAG retrieval pipeline flow.

Diagram critic PASSED cycle 1 — 7-node LR pipeline (User query → Embed query → Vector DB ANN search → Top-k chunks → Assemble prompt; User query also feeds directly to Assemble prompt). PNG rendered 1400px transparent bg. Visual inspection clean.
Reading generated — 1251 words, 7 min. All 4 primary resources cited. Diagram embedded. 6 fixed sections, no frontmatter.
Quiz generated — 6 MCQ, positions [0,2,1,0,3,3], max_share=0.333, bias_defense_applied=true.
Reading critic PASSED cycle 1 — 1251w/7min in [1200,1400], all 4 cited, format clean, no forward refs, scope tight, beginner-readable.
Quiz critic PASSED cycle 1 — 6 MCQ, max_share=0.333, 0 absurd distractors, all 5 LOs covered, 0 out-of-scope. Soft: q3 borderline length bias (non-blocking).
All artifact critics passed — advancing to HITL #3.
HITL #3 approved — reading 1251w/7min PASS, quiz 6MCQ bias-defended PASS (cycle 1), diagram PASS (cycle 1). No carry-over failures.
